name: Case Study: Financial and Career Stress
history: Financial difficulties following questionable investments. Increased reliance on parents for financial assistance.
intermediate_belief: I must avoid making mistakes to prevent negative outcomes.
intermediate_belief_depression: I am unable to make the right decisions for my future.
coping_strategies: Avoid discussing financial and career plans with parents to prevent conflict.
situation: A discussion with family members about future plans and potential career changes.
auto_thought: My parents will not understand and will criticize my decisions.
behavior: Avoidance of conversations with parents about career and financial plans.
